facebook.content:
We're on the cusp of a major shift in the economy of faith. Coming in The Kingdom Report, our upcoming newsletter, we'll reveal how the latest breakthroughs in the realm of blessings and prosperity are not just for the few, but for anyone who operates in the Kingdom system. 

As Pastor Curtis says, "When you make sure God's business is taken care of, God will always make sure that your business is taken care of.
